assertions.title: Final review summations reconcile exact system scores and missing-member skips on a score-rich round

steps.action: Capture pre-state and run importer dry-run for round 17948
steps.expected: Dry-run reports the score-rich fixture counts from shared state

steps.action: Run apply and fetch post-apply review summations and skipped artifact
steps.expected: Imported finals plus missing-member skips reconcile one-for-one to legacy finalists
steps.observed: post finals=45; skipped final members=36; legacy finalists=81; imported+skipped matched legacy member set exactly

steps.action: Compare imported final aggregateScore values to /mnt/Informix long_comp_result.system_point_total in Python
steps.expected: Every imported final score equals legacy system_point_total and skipped members have no imported final
steps.observed: All 45 imported finals matched legacy system_point_total exactly; 36 missing-member finalists appeared only in the skipped artifact

assertions.title: Each imported final score is attached to the member's latest non-example submission only

steps.action: Fetch full submission and review-summation API snapshots after apply
steps.expected: Every imported finalist has one attached final review summation on an imported non-example submission
steps.observed: post submissions=370 and post finals=45; each finalist had exactly one final review summation

steps.action: Compare each final reviewSummation submissionId to the member's latest imported submission
steps.expected: Each final attaches to the member's latest imported non-example submission only
steps.observed: All 45 finals referenced the same submission id and legacySubmissionId as the member's latest imported submission

steps.action: Compare attached legacySubmissionId values to latest legacy non-example submissions in Python
steps.expected: Final attachments match legacy latest non-example submissions and never point at example runs
steps.observed: All 45 finals matched the latest legacy non-example submission; legacy example submission count for round 17948 was 0

assertions.title: Final-score order reproduces legacy placement order after excluding missing-member skips

steps.action: Sort imported final review summations by aggregateScore descending
steps.expected: Imported final ordering reproduces legacy placement order after excluding missing-member finalists
steps.observed: Imported sorted final list contained 45 members and matched the legacy filtered finalist order exactly

steps.action: Filter legacy final-result rows by skipped missing-member finalists
steps.expected: Legacy filtered order has the same member and placement sequence as imported finals
steps.observed: Legacy filtered member order and placement sequence both matched the imported final order

assertions.title: Score reruns preserve stable imported identities and skipped-member reporting

steps.action: Run apply for round 17948 twice and capture raw stdout/stderr plus skipped artifacts
steps.expected: Rerun creates no duplicate final/provisional records and preserves skipped-member reporting
steps.observed: first apply created provisional scores=370; rerun created provisional scores=0; rerun created final scores=0

steps.action: Compare post-apply and post-rerun review-summation identity sets
steps.expected: Final and provisional identity sets stay unchanged and remain one-per-submission
steps.observed: final ids stable at 45; provisional ids stable at 370; no duplicate final or provisional submission links found

steps.action: Diff apply-skipped.json vs rerun-skipped.json for score-related records
steps.expected: Score skip records remain deterministic and duplicate-free across reruns
steps.observed: score-related skipped records were identical across runs (367 records) with no duplicate entries detected

frictions.description: The submissions and reviewSummations APIs defaulted to paginated responses, so full-round validation required adding perPage=1000 to fetch all round 17948 records.
frictions.resolution: Captured evidence with perPage=1000 for submissions and reviewSummations before doing Python reconciliation.

frictions.description: The skipped artifact mixes member-level final/provisional skip records with per-submission provisional skip records, so score validation needed explicit filtering by affectedSurfaces and exact-record diffing.
frictions.resolution: Filtered score-related records in Python, compared exact canonical JSON records across runs, and separately counted final-score member skips.

summary: Tested 4 assertions for round 17948 finals: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Dry-run confirmed 81 legacy final candidates with 45 imported finals, 36 missing-member final skips, and 0 explicit unattachable-finalist skips; apply added 370 provisional review summations, and rerun preserved stable final/provisional identities and deterministic skipped-member score records.
